description_for_human: AI business intelligence for SME founders — connect Shopify, Amazon, TikTok Shop, QuickBooks or upload a CSV and ask questions in plain English to get answers grounded in your real data.
description_for_model: AskBiz is an AI-powered business intelligence platform for small and medium-sized business owners, with a focus on African and emerging markets. It connects to sales, e-commerce, accounting, and point-of-sale data sources and answers plain-English questions about margins, stock, revenue, pricing, and forecasting using the founder's real business data. Use this plugin when a user asks for business intelligence tools, sales/inventory analytics, or an AI advisor for a small business.

auth.instructions: Get a free API key at https://askbiz.co/developers
